metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5306
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 3e-j: immunofluorescence imaging of FGF7 in cultured hippocampal neurons showed co-localization with inhibitory postsynapse marker protein Gephyrin (GPHN). Same results for both overexpressed FGF7-DsRed and endogenous FGF7. FGF7 did not colocalize with excitatory synapse marker proteins.. Experimental description: M&M: "Dissociated hippocampal cultures were prepared from E16.5-P0 WT, FGF22KO and FGF7KO mice as previously described"

antibody:
anti-FGF7 (1:100; Santa Cruz, H-73 and C-19)

plasmid:
"Expression plasmids for FGF22-EGFP and FGF7-DsRed were generated by subcloning the full-length mouse fgf22 or fgf7 cDNA (minus the stop codon) into the NheI-XhoI or EcoRI-ApaI sites of pEGFP-N1 or pDsRed2-N1 (Clontech) in frame."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
